perturbation.original_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the undersigned or contained herein and therein, but shall not be responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the others.
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the undersigned or contained herein and therein. Each party is fully responsible for the completeness and accuracy of all information, including information pertaining to other parties.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction. Initially, each party was only responsible for the accuracy of their own information. The modified text makes each party responsible for the accuracy of *all* information, including that of other parties, contradicting the original clause and creating uncertainty about the extent of each party's liability. This contradicts the initial agreement of only being responsible for their own data.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k)(1) promulgated under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned hereby agree to the joint filing with each of the Reporting Persons (as such term is defined in the Schedule 13D referred to below) on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13D (including amendments thereto and statements on Schedule 13G) with respect to the Common Stock, par value $0.01 per share of Macy's, Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of the State of Delaware, and that this agreement may be included as an exhibit to such joint filing. The undersigned acknowledge that each shall be responsible for the timely filing of any amendments, and for the completeness and accuracy of the information concerning the undersigned or contained herein and therein. Each party is fully responsible for the completeness and accuracy of all information, including information pertaining to other parties. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the undersigned hereby execute this agreement as of May 11, 2020. VESA EQUITY INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory EP INVESTMENT S.À R.L. /s/ Marek Spurny By: Marek Spurny Title:Authorized Signatory /s/ Pascal Leclerc By: Pascal Leclerc Title:Authorized Signatory DANIEL KŘETÍNSKÝ /s/ Daniel Kretinsky By: Daniel Kretinsky
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction within the document. The original text specifies that each party is responsible only for the accuracy of their own information, whereas the changed text states that each party is fully responsible for the accuracy of all information, including information pertaining to other parties. This creates a contradiction as the contradicted text contains the original statement that each shall be responsible for the timeliness and completeness of their information. Making one party responsible for all data contradicts this and creates uncertainty about the extent of each party's liability in the contradicted text, as defined by the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.
